title: Fix CBOR encoding in context_3, sig_structure, and AAD for MAC_2/MAC_3 and AEAD in lichen edhoc to match Python cbor2
close_reason: Fixed CBOR encoding for context_3, sig_structure, AAD/MAC_2/MAC_3/AEAD to match Python cbor2 by implementing build_* helpers using encode_bstr for deterministic matching
